testsuite.name: ru.netology.AuthTest

testcase.name: Should get error message if login with not registered user
testcase.failure: Element not found {[data-test-id=login] .input} Expected: editable Screenshot: file:/C:/Users/mutov/Desktop/Netology/Java/Project/Patterns2/build/reports/tests/1776885745285.0.png Page source: file:/C:/Users/mutov/Desktop/Netology/Java/Project/Patterns2/build/reports/tests/1776885745285.0.html Timeout: 4 s. testcase.name: Should successfully login with active registered user
